'''mayate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:idealistically|idealistically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-y-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:idealistically|idealistically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mayate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:mayate|mayate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mayatesher|mayatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mayatesherĂ«m|mayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mayatero|mayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mayateshĂ«|mayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mayateshĂ«m|mayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimayatero|gokimayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimayateshĂ«|gokimayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimayateshĂ«m|gokimayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomayankerom|gomayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomayankeshĂ«|gomayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomayankeshĂ«m|gomayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomayankeya|gomayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mayaterom|mayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mayatemu|mayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mayateya|mayateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimayaterom|gokimayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimayatemu|gokimayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimayateya|gokimayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:mayayate|mayayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mayayatesher|mayayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mayayatesherĂ«m|mayayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mayayatero|mayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mayayateshĂ«|mayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mayayateshĂ«m|mayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimayayatero|gokimayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimayayateshĂ«|gokimayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimayayateshĂ«m|gokimayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomayayankerom|gomayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomayayankeshĂ«|gomayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomayayankeshĂ«m|gomayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomayayankeya|gomayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mayayaterom|mayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mayayatemu|mayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mayayateya|mayayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimayayaterom|gokimayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimayayatemu|gokimayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimayayateya|gokimayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:mĂŠyĂŠte|mĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mĂŠyĂŠtesher|mĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|mĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠyĂŠtero|mĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|mĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|mĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠyĂŠtero|gokimĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokimĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokimĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomĂŠyĂŠnkerom|gomĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|gomĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gomĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomĂŠyĂŠnkeya|gomĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠyĂŠterom|mĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠyĂŠtemu|mĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mĂŠyĂŠteya|mĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠyĂŠterom|gokimĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokimĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimĂŠyĂŠteya|gokimĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:mafyafte|mafyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mafyaftesher|mafyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafyaftesherĂ«m|mafyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafyaftero|mafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mafyafteshĂ«|mafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafyafteshĂ«m|mafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafyaftero|gokimafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimafyafteshĂ«|gokimafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafyafteshĂ«m|gokimafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomafyafnkerom|gomafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomafyafnkeshĂ«|gomafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomafyafnkeshĂ«m|gomafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomafyafnkeya|gomafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafyafterom|mafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafyaftemu|mafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mafyafteya|mafyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafyafterom|gokimafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafyaftemu|gokimafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimafyafteya|gokimafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
